There are innumerable combinations and Yogas g.iven in the texts
indicating foreign travels, living in foreign land, etc. My first attempt
here is to bring out some of the broad factors and more important
undertying principles signifying foreign travels, and to appty them to a
few practical cases of natal and horary charts. The usual rules governing
horary as.,ology have also been applied where necessary.
